title: update-alternatives
html:
update-alternatives

File Write

Write in `/path/to/output-file` a symlink to `/path/to/temp-file`.

echo DATA >/path/to/temp-file
update-alternatives --force --install /path/to/output-file x /path/to/temp-file 0
excerpt: update-alternatives File Write Write in `/path/to/output-file` a symlink to `/path/to/temp-file`. echo DATA >/path/to/temp-file update-alternatives --force --install /path/to/output-file x /path/to/temp-file 0
